steps.title: Set up
steps.content: The question asks for $\left(2\right)(x-3)$ directly. From $44 = 6 + 2(x-3)$, isolate the target expression by subtracting $6$ from both sides.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, compare the result from the work to the answer choices. The value, equation, or condition found above is $38$, and the other choices fail the same setup or substitution. Therefore C is correct.
